sections.paragraph:
ἐπιβιβάζω fut. ἐπιβιβῶ LXX; 1 aor. ἐπεβίβασα put someone (τινά) on someth. cause someone to mount (βιβάζω ‘cause to mount’; Thu. et al.; PCairZen 805, 4 [III b.c.]; BGU 1742, 12; 1743, 9; Sb 9754, 12 [all I b.c.]; LXX) put on, put Jesus ἐπὶ τ. πῶλον Lk 19:35 (cp. ET 42, ’31, 236f; 288; 381f; 382f; 526f); cp. Ac 23:24. τινὰ ἐπὶ τὸ ἴδιον κτῆνος on his own animal Lk 10:34 (cp. 3 Km 1:33; but ἐ. ἐπί can also mean load upon [2 Km 6:3], assuming that the man was unconscious).—DELG s.v. βαίνω.

fut. fut. = fut.

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

aor. aor. = aorist

someth. someth. = something

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PCairZen PCairZen = Zenon Papyri, Catalogue général . . . du Musée du Caire—List 4

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

ET ET = Expository Times—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 368
